title: Community Moderation Update (2026-04-29)
body: Today's moderation actions: 1) Banned user 'spam_wave_42' for posting phishing links across multiple channels. 2) Banned user 'toxic_runner' for repeated targeted harassment of community newcomers. 3) Closed false positive report against core maintainer resulting from coordinated brigading. We remain committed to keeping our community safe for all members. If you see abusive behavior, please report it through the official channels.
